svg.title: RAG Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Full Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline showing indexing phase, query phase, retrieval, and generation steps with data flows.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What types of documents can be indexed in RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does text chunking work in RAG? What are the strategies?')
sendPrompt('What are common embedding models used in RAG?')
sendPrompt('What is a vector database? How does it store and search embeddings?')
sendPrompt('How does a user query enter the RAG pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a query is encoded in RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does the retriever find relevant chunks in RAG? What is ANN search?')
sendPrompt('What are top-k retrieved chunks and how are they ranked?')
sendPrompt('How is the prompt constructed in RAG? What goes into the context window?')
sendPrompt('What LLMs are commonly used with RAG? How does the LLM use the context?')
sendPrompt('What makes a RAG answer grounded and how does citation work?')
sendPrompt('What is a re-ranker in RAG and why does it improve quality?')

svg.text: Click any box to learn more ↑
